title: Cryptool partners with Radom Network for crypto payments
content_html:
Cryptool is partnering with Radom Network to bring modern crypto payment rails to businesses on the platform.

The partnership covers three core capabilities:

  • Crypto subscription payments
  • Streamlined payouts and crypto billing
  • Automated recurring payments

For Cryptool users this means a cleaner way to handle ongoing crypto transactions, whether for subscriptions, vendor payouts or recurring revenue.
author: Cryptool
